$comment: Single source of truth for the premium property-category email subdomains the platform reserves for resale (rent, property, apartments, ...) rather than first-come branding. REMOVING a label here RELEASES it — the next owner/manager can claim it (the sale flow) — and ADDING a label reserves it; both take effect at the next API deploy. The API layer (routes/_lib/premium-subdomains.ts) validates and freezes this list at import time, so a malformed file fails the boot/test. The DB backstop (public.reserved_subdomain_labels, migration 20260721000001) follows this file automatically: it is reconciled to match the premium rows on every API boot (admin/sync-premium-subdomains.ts) — no migration per edit. Every entry MUST be a lowercase RFC-1035 DNS label (a-z, 0-9, interior hyphens only; 1..63 chars), not an xn-- label, not the em<digits> return-path shape, and disjoint from the operational/ops reserved names.
